tests.name: test_broker_writes_mss_overlay_trace_for_disabled_missing_and_normal
assertions: variant mismatch writes overlay_state=DISABLED and coverage_flag=OVERLAY_DISABLED
enabled but missing snapshot writes overlay_state=MISSING and coverage_flag=SNAPSHOT_MISSING
enabled with l3_mss_daily snapshot writes overlay_state=NORMAL
NORMAL case persists market_signal=BEARISH and ranker_mss_score=20.0

tests.name: test_broker_mss_overlay_reduces_position_size_under_bearish_regime
assertions: BEARISH quantity is strictly lower than BULLISH quantity

tests.name: test_broker_mss_overlay_reduces_effective_max_positions_under_bearish_regime
assertions: with MAX_POSITIONS=3 and holdings=2, BULLISH still accepts order
with BEARISH overlay, effective_max_positions clamps to 1
same signal is rejected with MAX_POSITIONS_REACHED under BEARISH

notes: Current evidence proves execution-layer MSS overlay is live under the MSS-enabled DTT variant.
This evidence is test-scoped; it verifies semantics and regime response, not long-window alpha contribution.
